siem.name: 3FA Security Monitoring
siem.description: Règles d'alerte pour l'application Triple Auth

alert_rules.name: Brute Force détecté
alert_rules.description: 3 échecs de connexion ou plus en moins de 5 minutes pour le même utilisateur
alert_rules.query: SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) as attempts, MIN(date) as first_attempt, MAX(date) as last_attempt FROM audit_logs WHERE action = 'LOGIN_FAIL' AND date >= NOW() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE GROUP BY user_id HAVING attempts >= 3

alert_rules.name: Connexion depuis nouvelle IP
alert_rules.description: Un utilisateur se connecte depuis une adresse IP jamais vue
alert_rules.query: SELECT l.user_id, l.ip, l.date FROM logs l WHERE l.status = 'success' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM logs l2 WHERE l2.user_id = l.user_id AND l2.ip = l.ip AND l2.date < l.date)

alert_rules.name: Compte bloqué
alert_rules.description: Un compte utilisateur vient d'être bloqué automatiquement
alert_rules.query: SELECT user_id, action, detail, ip, date FROM audit_logs WHERE action = 'ACCOUNT_BLOCKED' AND date >= NOW() - INTERVAL 1 MINUTE

alert_rules.name: Accès non autorisé
alert_rules.description: Tentative d'accès à une ressource protégée sans authentification
alert_rules.query: SELECT user_id, action, detail, ip, date FROM audit_logs WHERE action = 'UNAUTHORIZED_ACCESS' AND date >= NOW() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE

alert_rules.name: Volume d'uploads anormal
alert_rules.description: Plus de 10 fichiers uploadés en moins de 10 minutes
alert_rules.query: SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) as uploads FROM audit_logs WHERE action = 'FILE_UPLOAD' AND date >= NOW() - INTERVAL 10 MINUTE GROUP BY user_id HAVING uploads > 10

alert_rules.name: Échec OTP répété
alert_rules.query: SELECT user_id, COUNT(*) as fails FROM audit_logs WHERE action = 'OTP_FAIL' AND date >= NOW() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE GROUP BY user_id HAVING fails >= 3
alert_rules.action: Invalider l'OTP en cours et demander reconnexion

dashboard_widgets.title: Connexions réussies (24h)
dashboard_widgets.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM logs WHERE status = 'success' AND date >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR

dashboard_widgets.title: Échecs de connexion (24h)
dashboard_widgets.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM logs WHERE status = 'fail' AND date >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR

dashboard_widgets.title: Comptes bloqués actifs
dashboard_widgets.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE blocked = 1

dashboard_widgets.title: IP distinctes (7 jours)
dashboard_widgets.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ip) FROM logs WHERE date >= NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY

dashboard_widgets.title: Timeline des événements de sécurité
dashboard_widgets.query: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00') as hour, action, COUNT(*) as count FROM audit_logs WHERE date >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR GROUP BY hour, action ORDER BY hour

dashboard_widgets.title: Top 10 IP suspectes
dashboard_widgets.query: SELECT ip, COUNT(*) as attempts FROM logs WHERE status = 'fail' AND date >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR GROUP BY ip ORDER BY attempts DESC LIMIT 10
